% Required LaTeX packages: booktabs, makecell.
\begin{table*}[!t]
\centering
\caption{UNSAT-recall on VNN-COMP'25 benchmarks (compact). Each cell reports \emph{UNSAT-recall}\,$\uparrow$ = $\#\,\mathrm{correct}\,\mathrm{UNSAT} / \#\,\mathrm{effective}\,\mathrm{UNSAT}$. An instance counts as \emph{effective UNSAT} if the VNN-COMP'25 ground-truth consensus is UNSAT or if every sound tool timed out / abstained \emph{and} no tool emitted a SAT counterexample. This denominator is the same across methods. The numerator counts instances where the tool emitted UNSAT and the effective ground truth is UNSAT (sound violations excluded from the numerator). A dagger ($\dagger N$) annotates cells where the tool committed $N$ sound violations\,---\,$N$ matches the dagger count in the companion \% Solved table. An em-dash ($-$) indicates the verifier's loader does not support the network, the benchmark was not run, or the benchmark has no effective-UNSAT instances. \textbf{Bold} percentages indicate per-column highlights. Companion table \ref{tab:main_results_recall} reports the same data with the $(\#\,\mathrm{correct} / \#\,\mathrm{total})$ breakdown.}
\label{tab:main_results_recall_compact}
